settings.title: Direct Sourcing
settings.copy: We work directly with 72,000+ farmers across Chhattisgarh, ensuring they get fair value for their hard work.

settings.title: Pure & Organic
settings.copy: Our millets and oils are processed without any additives, preserving the ancient nutritional value.

settings.title: Traceable Journey
settings.copy: Every pack has a story. We make the entire journey from farm to your kitchen completely transparent.

settings.title: Nurturing Soil, Empowering Farmers
settings.copy: Phasal Bazar was born from a simple vision: to bring the health of ancient Indian grains back to your table while ensuring the farmers of Chhattisgarh thrive.

settings.title: Quality Assured
settings.copy: Rigorous testing at every stage of processing to ensure the highest purity standards.

settings.title: Rural Impact
settings.copy: By choosing us, you directly contribute to the livelihood of rural farming communities.

settings.title: Ancient Wisdom
settings.copy: We use traditional stone-ground and cold-pressed methods to keep nutrition intact.

settings.title: Why we do what we do
settings.copy: We believe that healthy food is a right, and fair pay for farmers is a necessity. Here is why we are different.
